title: digitaria filiformis var. hirta
intro: Digitaria filiformis var. hirta, also known as a type of Digitaria grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties that can help in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Digitaria filiformis var. hirta is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
